Our Services

Premium grooming services tailored for the modern gentleman

Haircut & Finish

$69/ 30 min

Haircut with scissors & clippers and finished off with styling.

Popular

Wash, Haircut & Style

$74/ 45 min

Cleansed, moisturised, cut and styled.

Trending

Skin Fade

$74/ 45 min

Haircut blends to skin on back and sides.

Beard Trim

$41/ 20 min

Defining and shortening your beard with precision by using clippers, finished with a hot towel.

Expert Barbers

“Every man carries a story in his reflection.

In the silence of the chair, transformation begins.

Steel meets skin, time slows,

and identity is refined.

This is not a haircut.

This is ritual.

The Experience

Your Ritual Awaits

01

Welcome Drink

Begin your journey with a premium whisky or craft beverage, setting the tone for what awaits.

02

Consultation

Your master barber listens, analyzes, and crafts a vision tailored to your unique features.

03

Precision Cut

Every stroke is deliberate. Every detail is intentional. This is where art meets expertise.

04

Final Styling

Leave not just looking different, but feeling transformed. The final touch of excellence.

The Full Experience

your signature.

Appointments Available Today|Premium Experience Guaranteed

The Barber Co. is Sydney's premier boutique barbershop. Behind every great gentleman is an extraordinary barber. Experience true craftsmanship in the heart of the CBD.
